prevalence.source: European ALS epidemiology syntheses / WHO Europe

vulnerablePopulations: patients with rapid progression requiring early multidisciplinary support
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis supported by EMG; structured ALS clinic pathways common in many countries

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Not curable; survival improved by multidisciplinary care and ventilatory support

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: High access to EMG and multidisciplinary ALS clinics in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Riluzole and supportive multidisciplinary care (NIV, PEG, rehab, palliative planning)
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Service variability and resource needs for long-term supportive care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established multidisciplinary ALS clinics in many systems
